content.query:
SELECT 
[ID]
,[Descr]
,'FHI' as OpCo
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_dct_DispositionCategories]
 union
SELECT 
[ID]
,[Descr]
,'HSI' as OpCo
 FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_dct_DispositionCategories]
 union
SELECT 
[ID]
,[Descr]
,'MAC' as OpCo
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_dct_DispositionCategories]
 union
SELECT 
[ID]
,[Descr]
,'FPBC' as OpCo
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PBC_dct_DispositionCategories]
 union
SELECT 
[ID]
,[Descr]
,'PHI' as OpCo
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_dct_DispositionCategories]
 union
SELECT 
[ID]
,[Descr]
,'RTW' as OpCo
 FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_dct_DispositionCategories]
 union
SELECT 
[ID]
,[Descr]
,'SWR' as OpCo
 FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_dct_DispositionCategories]
